description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:10.9.0 Docker image. Add a pages job that runs in the deploy stage, executes the shell commands `npm install`, `npm install -g @angular/cli`, and `ng build --prod --base-href /gitlab-project-issues-with-time-gpit/`, and then publishes the `public` directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. The pipeline has no additional stages, services, caches, or conditional rules.
